overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing the protagonist Jin Sakai exploring a misty forest hot spring location called 'Kappa's Hot Spring'. The character walks along the edge of milky blue thermal pools surrounded by vibrant red autumn foliage and traditional stone lanterns in a foggy, atmospheric setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with hanging totem mask

events.description: location text 'KAPPA'S HOT SPRING' appears and fades on screen

agents.ego_description: stands before a tree observing the hanging demon mask, then turns and walks toward the hot spring area

entered.detail: red oni demon mask with horns hanging from a bare tree branch by ropes
large gnarled tree trunk with twisted branches
autumn trees with reddish foliage in the background
fog-shrouded mountain peaks visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle view of a red demon mask hanging from a bare tree in a foggy forest. The character stands observing it before the camera pans down and begins moving forward. Location text appears identifying this as 'Kappa's Hot Spring' as the character walks away from the tree toward an opening in the woods.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the edge of the steaming hot spring pool, observing the milky blue water

entered.detail: milky turquoise thermal pool with steam rising from the surface
white steam rising from multiple vents around the hot spring
traditional Japanese stone lantern visible across the water
strikingly bright red Japanese maple tree beside the pool

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the open hot spring area, walking along the edge of a milky turquoise pool surrounded by steam and autumn foliage. A vibrant red maple tree stands out against the muted foggy background, while a stone lantern is visible across the water. The ground is covered in dry grass and dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: hot spring area with stone lantern and wooden fence

agents.ego_description: continuing around the hot spring perimeter, passing a lit stone lantern and approaching a wooden fence

entered.detail: traditional stone lantern with warm firelight glowing inside
simple wooden post fence running along the path
stone steps leading up from the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking around the hot spring, passing a lit stone lantern on the left. The vibrant red maple tree recedes into the background as the character moves past it. A wooden fence appears along the left side of the path, and stone steps lead up from the water's edge into the misty forest ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a mysterious forest marker into a serene, steaming thermal spring area. It begins with a low-angle view of a red demon mask hanging from a bare tree in the fog, before the camera pans down and follows the character as they walk away from the woods. As the character emerges into the open, the scene expands to reveal milky turquoise pools surrounded by rising steam and vibrant red autumn foliage. The camera then glides past a lit stone lantern and a striking red maple tree, moving along a path of dry grass and dirt. Finally, the view shifts toward a wooden fence and stone steps that lead away from the water's edge and back into the misty forest.
